content:
i found my dead grandmother's Percocet and refilled the prescriptions right after she died

on labor day 2021, i was on grinder , 6+ mg xanax, 80+ mg adderall, and drinking wine, then decided to get in my car and try and find a hookup drinking white claws in my car, don't think i fucked anyone, but went into a few places i can't remember ,

as the sun was about to almost come up, i made a u-turn, hit a curb, and got arrested ,

transferred campuses to wpb and moved in with dad and rachel and madelena and rocco

i was prescribed xanax and marijuana and found what drugs i could take while on probation and not get caught on drug tests,

each day a lottery would enact, and randomly select who peed, and at noon either get a notification or not;

ordered RC benzodiazepines from the dark web and got increasingly more and more obliterated to the point my dad and rachel strongly suggested rehab, which i went to,

after, they also highly suggested i take out a massive 20k loan (on top of my 100k student debt);
context: From document: i've been generating creative work since i was around 12 years old… — chunk 12 (chunk 12/13)
